name: dependency_provider_runtime
outcome_goal: Make first-party provider transport and error mapping explicit enough to stand on their own instead of depending on CLI-only behavior or route-fallback folklore.
anti_requirements: Do not treat the CLI adapter as the canonical provider runtime.
Do not split transport truth from route and fallback truth.
Do not widen into generic model-catalog cleanup.

jobs.label: provider_adapter_contract
jobs.prompt: Define the first-party provider adapter contract explicitly enough that transport, retry, and error mapping stop depending on CLI-only execution behavior.

jobs.label: provider_runtime_route_proof
jobs.prompt: Prove the runtime route and fallback seams are explicit, observable, and compatible with the first-party provider adapter contract. No implicit CLI bridge and no mystery failover.
